local.reconnectHint: This mesh lives in a local folder. Grant access again to open it (browsers drop folder permission on reload).

connStyle.title: Connection
connStyle.selectHint: Select a board, shape, draw, or connection to edit its style.

feedback.conflictResolved: Revision conflict — state updated from server.

errors.portalSelf: A portal cannot point to the same mesh.
errors.diagramEmpty: The AI returned no diagram. Try rephrasing.
errors.templateNoSelection: Select one or more elements first.

templates.title: Templates
templates.empty: No saved templates yet. Select elements and save.

layers.title: Layers
layers.selectHint: Select an element to reorder it.

file.importConfirm: Replace the current board with the imported file ({{count}} elements)?
file.importWrongKind: That file is not a mesh (.km).

textToDiagram.title: Text to diagram
textToDiagram.previewHint: Preview the result. Insert it onto the board, or discard.
textToDiagram.hint: Describe a flow, process, or structure and AI will draw it as connected shapes on the canvas.
textToDiagram.mermaidHint: Paste Mermaid (flowchart / erDiagram), Grarkdown, or Excalidraw JSON — or import a .excalidraw / .png / .md file. Rendered locally, no AI credits used.
textToDiagram.placeholder: e.g. User signup flow: start, enter email, verify code (decision), then dashboard
textToDiagram.mermaidPlaceholder:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B{Decision}
  B -->|yes| C[(Database)]
  B -->|no| D((End))

…or paste erDiagram / Grarkdown / Excalidraw JSON

hints.toolbar: Use the bottom toolbar · Pen (P) for iink · Double-click on brick to edit
